description: Convert a consensusXML into a wide intensity matrix (consensus features x samples) joined with feature metadata (RT, m/z, charge, quality), with optional cross-sample normalization (median/quantile) and an optional long/tidy format.
usage: Set INPUT (consensusXML). Optional LONG_FORMAT=1, NORMALIZE(median|quantile|none). Output: quant_matrix.csv (+ quant_long.csv).
limitation: Requires pyOpenMS 3.5.0 (Python 3.9+) and pandas to produce real content; if absent the porter still creates quant_matrix.csv and records the reason.
